value.title: Sapiom raises $15M to help AI agents buy their own tech tools
value.content: The startup -- with backing from Accel -- is building a financial layer that handles the authentication and micro-payments required for AI agents.

value.title: Reddit looks to AI search as its next big opportunity
value.content: During the company's fourth-quarter earnings call on Thursday, it offered an update on its plans to merge traditional and AI search together and hinted that although search is not yet monetized, "it's an enormous market and opportunity."

value.title: AWS revenue continues to soar as cloud demand remains high
value.content: AWS recorded its best quarter, in terms of revenue growth, in 13 quarters in Q4 2025 as AI drives AWS adoption.

value.title: Amazon and Google are winning the AI capex race — but what’s the prize?
value.content: In 2026, Amazon plans to spend $200 billion in capex. Google is just behind at $175 billion to $185 billion. It's a lot of money!

value.title: OpenAI launches new agentic coding model only minutes after Anthropic drops its own
value.content: The new model is built to accelerate the capabilities of Codex, the agentic coding tool OpenAI launched earlier this week.

value.title: Elon Musk is getting serious about orbital data centers
value.content: We’re starting to see the idea of Musk-owned orbital AI data clusters cohere into an actual plan.

value.title: OpenAI launches a way for enterprises to build and manage AI agents
value.content: OpenAI launched Frontier, a new platform designed for enterprises to build and deploy agents while treating them like human employees.

value.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.6 with new ‘agent teams’
value.content: The newest version of Anthropic's model is designed to broaden its capabilities and appeal, allowing for a greater variety of uses and customers.

value.title: Meta tests a stand-alone app for its AI-generated ‘Vibes’ videos
value.content: Launched last September, Vibes lets you create and share short-form AI-generated videos and access a dedicated feed that displays AI videos from others.

value.title: Fundamental raises $255M Series A with a new take on big data analysis
value.content: Fundamental has built a new foundation model to solve an old problem: how to draw insights from the huge quantities of structured data produced by enterprises.

value.title: ElevenLabs CEO: Voice is the next interface for AI
value.content: ElevenLabs CEO argued at Web Summit Qatar that voice is the next interface for AI, as OpenAI, Google, and Apple push conversational systems into wearables, new hardware, and everyday interactions.

value.title: Sam Altman got exceptionally testy over Claude Super Bowl ads
value.content: He posted a novella-sized rant that devolved into to calling his rival "dishonest" and "authoritarian."

value.title: Alphabet won’t talk about the Google-Apple AI deal, even to investors
value.content: Alphabet CEO skipped an analyst's question about Apple on the company's earnings call.

value.title: Google’s Gemini app has surpassed 750M monthly active users
value.content: Google revealed a significant milestone for its Gemini app, announcing over 750 million monthly active users as it competes with ChatGPT and Meta AI.

value.title: Meet Gizmo: A TikTok for interactive, vibe-coded mini apps
value.content: Gizmo's app is like a TikTok for vibe-coded mini apps... and it's a lot of fun.

value.title: AI SRE Resolve AI confirms $125M raise, unicorn valuation
value.content: The two-year-old startup confirms that it closed a Series A led by Lightspeed at $1 billion valuation.

value.title: Amazon to begin testing AI tools for film and TV production next month
value.content: Amazon MGM Studios will reportedly begin a closed beta program in March to test its AI tools to help with film and TV production.

value.title: A16z just raised $1.7B for AI infrastructure. Here’s where it’s going.
value.content: Andreessen Horowitz just raised a whopping ⁠new $15 billion in funding⁠. And a $1.7 billion chunk of that is going to its ⁠infrastructure team⁠, the one responsible for some of its biggest, most prominent AI investments including Black Forrest Labs, Cursor, OpenAI, ⁠ElevenLabs⁠, Ideogram, ⁠Fal⁠ and dozens of others.   A16z ⁠general partner with the infra team Jennifer Li⁠ (who oversees such investments as ElevenLabs – just valued at $11 billion); Ideagram and Fal, has a clear thesis on where the team is looking […]

value.title: What a16z is actually funding (and what it’s ignoring) when it comes to AI infra
value.content: Andreessen Horowitz just raised a whopping new $15 billion in funding. And a $1.7 billion chunk of that is going to its infrastructure team, the one responsible for some of its biggest, most prominent AI investments, including Black Forest Labs, Cursor, OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Ideogram, Fal, and dozens of others.   a16z general partner with the infra team Jennifer Li (who oversees such investments as ElevenLabs — just valued at $11 billion) has a clear thesis on where the team is looking to […]

value.title: Tinder looks to AI to help fight ‘swipe fatigue’ and dating app burnout
value.content: Tinder is testing AI recommendations and insight from your Camera Roll for better matches.
